description: Unified observability dashboard for Patient Management System microservices. Covers HTTP traffic, JVM internals, HikariCP, Tomcat threads, logs (Loki) and distributed traces (Zipkin).

targets.expr: sum by(uri)(http_server_requests_seconds_sum{application="$application", instance="$instance", uri!~".*actuator.*"}) / sum by(uri)(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$application", instance="$instance", uri!~".*actuator.*"})

title: PMS — Microservices Observability
